node.reason: N7200 good/medium expansion with bad outlier_low_confidence trimmed; bad remains core-island guardrail.

snr_profile.name: paper_table_strict
snr_profile.note: Sensors2025 Table-1-like bins; target SNR uses EM+MA only.

rows.selection_basis: Original-aware SemiCleanBUT node N7200_gm_trim_bad region-aware 64D/PCA target; no original BUT test metric is used for generator selection.
rows.note: SemiCleanBUT overlap target; good/medium are intentionally less pristine and keep boundary overlap, bad targets the separated right island.
rows.refine_note: SemiCleanBUT overlap target; good/medium are intentionally less pristine and keep boundary overlap, bad targets the separated right island. N6800 medium-subtype refit: V5 medium-dose visible-QRS baseline mound branch; intended to target the medium-as-good mound/step errors without low-QRS bad-like collapse. N6800 medium-subtype refit: V5 visible-QRS baseline mound: add a small-dose smooth baseline mound/step/ramp branch for medium rows that look QRS-trackable but should not collapse into good.
